notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher AJ Blubaugh. Edouard Julien scores. Hunter Goodman to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Hunter Goodman plunked
notableEvents.detail: Hunter Goodman hit by pitch. Tyler Freeman to 3rd. Mickey Moniak to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Brice Matthews pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brice Matthews singles on a line drive to left fielder Mickey Moniak. Isaac Paredes scores. Christian Walker to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Brice Matthews pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brice Matthews grounds out, third baseman Kyle Karros to first baseman TJ Rumfield.

notableEvents.label: Brice Matthews pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brice Matthews walks. Joey Loperfido to 2nd.
